_comment: Copy to a private, mode-600 file (e.g. /etc/obsidian-multivault-mcp-users.json) and point MCP_USERS_FILE at it. One entry per person. Each passphrase MUST be strong and DISTINCT — it is that person's entire login and it decides which vault they get. Optional per-user keys: "readOnly": true, "ext": [".md", ".canvas"].
